name: Dynastash
summary: The Dynastash is a compact, durable, and aesthetically pleasing wooden box designed specifically for storing and concealing your VapCap.
description: The Dynastash is a compact, durable, and aesthetically pleasing wooden box designed specifically for storing and concealing your VapCap. Made from cocolobo wood, these boxes come in a variety of colours and grains, making them a stylish accessory for any VapCap owner. The box is also said to enhance the overall VapCap experience and is perfect for carrying your device on-the-go. Dynastash boasts additional features that we will explore more in-depth below. Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
